channel.title: Research & Programs on IQSS Clone - Harvard Institute for Quantitative Social Science
channel.description: Recent content in Research & Programs on IQSS Clone - Harvard Institute for Quantitative Social Science

item.title: Scientific Programs
item.description:
Scientific Programs

IQSS scientific programs focus on areas of inquiry that are of particular interest to their faculty directors and enjoy a close working relationship with IQSS administrative, development, and technical staff.

item.title: Incubation
item.description:
Incubation

IQSS partners with faculty and researchers to incubate data-intensive social science research initiatives. This process involves working as a team to move the idea through the incubation life cycle, which includes discovery, development, launch, growth, and assessment.

item.title: Programs & Products
item.description:
Programs & Products

Programs & Products

IQSS houses and develops many faculty-led scientific programs, as well as software and systems tools designed to facilitate research and the use of large datasets. Incubation

IQSS partners with faculty and researchers to incubate data-intensive social science research initiatives.
